race.description: Arc Seeing Everyone Back Next Season (Bm58+) Hcp
race.comment: BRAVE APACHE (4) hard to knock his recent form, winning his past two in good fashion. The better draw this time around is a big tick and he bolted in to win in this grade two back. Carries more weight now, but will be very tough to run down from the front with Nottle in the saddle. ENCHANTED STAR (7) should appreciate the rise in trip today after a sound return at Ascot when getting well back in the run. She'll be fitter for that effort and Pike rides now as she carries less weight coming back in grade. There aren't many chinks in her armour. THREE GRAND (6) showed little early speed then came with a powerful run to finish second last time out over 1100m at this track. Must be included. CHINO LA DIVA (1) proved too strong two runs ago at Ascot. Safely held last time out when ninth over 1200m at Ascot, beaten 5L. Rocky Cheung is a key engagement. Has the class to find the winners' list. TIME CONNECTION (8) can bounce back in this more suitable assignment.
